candidates.ai_summary: 2026-04-16 VideoAsk intro passed. Vanity Jackson (Georgia). Located in lock Donia, Georgia area and I'm open to traveling, 50mi drive. Availability: FT, PT, around school. Conflict resolution approach: If one child has another, my first step is to stay calm and make sure the children are safe. Why they'd be a great fit: How to make a great up, kid teacher, because I'm patient dependable and I work well with children. I also create a safe positive environment adapt quickly and I bring a calm professional attitude to the classroom.

transcripts.q4: I live in the lock Donia, Georgia area and I'm open to traveling where needed I would say. Maybe roughly 50 miles or so, but just let me know and I can do whatever is needed.
transcripts.q5: Right now, I'm open to part-time but eventually I will be open to full time. And as far as H goes, it just depends on what's available. And I also can do after school and weekends, if available
transcripts.q6: If one child has another, my first step is to stay calm and make sure the children are safe. I would separate them right away, check on the child, that's hurt. Make sure everyone is settled in, and then I would address the behavior clearly and firmly and letting the child know that hitting is not, okay, and will not be tolerated.
transcripts.q7: How to make a great up, kid teacher, because I'm patient dependable and I work well with children. I also create a safe positive environment adapt quickly and I bring a calm professional attitude to the classroom.
